name: Pizu Group Holdings Limited
summary: Pizu Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, trades in non-ferrous metals and bulk minerals in the People's Republic of China and Tajikistan. The company operates in Bulk Mineral Trade, and Explosives Trading and Blasting Services segments. It also manufactures and sells civil explosives; and offers blasting operation and related services, as well as provision of mining and subcontracting services. The company was formerly known as China Electric Power Technology Holdings Limited and changed its name to Pizu Group Holdings Limited in May 2012. Pizu Group Holdings Limited is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
